channel.title: Ai on Aamu.app blog
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on Aamu.app blog

item.title: AI support in Aamu.app
item.description: A reading path for Aamu.app's AI support workflow: AI workspace, Team Brain, customer support drafts, Helpdesk triage, and Linear comparison.

item.title: Aamu.app vs Linear Triage: customer conversations, Team Brain, and human-reviewed AI support
item.description: A practical comparison of Linear Triage and Aamu.app Helpdesk AI triage: product issue intake versus customer conversation intake.

item.title: From Helpdesk ticket to Team Brain: AI triage, Docs, and human review in Aamu.app
item.description: How Aamu.app connects Helpdesk AI triage, Docs, Team Brain, tasks, and human review so support teams can answer from maintained knowledge.

item.title: How Aamu.app uses Team Brain to answer from your company knowledge
item.description: How Team Brain helps Aamu.app answer from maintained company knowledge instead of generic AI guesses.

item.title: Aamu.app as an AI workspace alternative to Notion AI, Slack AI, Jira, and Zendesk
item.description: How Aamu.app works as an AI workspace alternative for teams that want docs, chat, tasks, support, and shared knowledge in one connected system.

item.title: AI customer support with Aamu.app: Team Brain, drafts, and human review
item.description: How Aamu.app uses Team Brain, AI-generated drafts, and human review to make customer support faster without losing control.
